v1.10.0 on Windows using MinGW fails","user":{"login":"Titas22","id":66130422,"node_id":"MDQ6VXNlcjY2MTMwNDIy","avatar_url":"https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/66130422?v=4","gravatar_id":"","url":"https://api.github.com/users/Titas22","html_url":"https://github.com/Titas22","followers_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Titas22/followers","following_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Titas22/following{/other_user}","gists_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Titas22/gists{/gist_id}","starred_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Titas22/starred{/owner}{/repo}","subscriptions_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Titas22/subscriptions","organizations_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Titas22/orgs","repos_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Titas22/repos","events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Titas22/events{/privacy}","received_events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Titas22/received_events","type":"User","user_view_type":"public","site_admin":false},"labels":[{"id":210703,"node_id":"MDU6TGFiZWwyMTA3MDM=","url":"https://api.github.com/repos/JuliaLang/julia/labels/building","name":"building","color":"444444","default":false,"description":"Build dependencies"},{"id":5669611,"node_id":"MDU6TGFiZWw1NjY5NjEx","url":"https://api.github.com/repos/JuliaLang/julia/labels/system:windows","name":"system:windows","color":"0b02e1","default":false,"description":"Affects only Windows"}],"state":"closed","locked":false,"assignee":null,"assignees":[],"milestone":null,"comments":4,"created_at":"2023-12-27T23:05:30Z","updated_at":"2024-10-26T14:28:51Z","closed_at":"2024-10-26T14:28:51Z","author_association":"NONE","active_lock_reason":null,"body":"Hi,

I'm trying to compile **Julia v1.10** on **Windows** unsing **MinGW**. I had no issues in the past (v1.8.x/v1.9.x) but seems to not be working even after a completely fresh reinstal of MSYS and re-cloning the repo.

The error I get is this:
```
make[2]: x86_64-w64-mingw32-ar: No such file or directory
make[2]: *** [Makefile:81: libutf8proc.a] Error 127
make[1]: *** [/c/julia/deps/utf8proc.mk:13: scratch/utf8proc-1cb28a66ca79a0845e99433fd1056257456cef8b/build-compiled] Error 2
make[1]: *** Waiting for unfinished jobs....
...
...
make: *** [Makefile:75: julia-deps] Error 2
```

I believe it's related to `x86_64-w64-mingw32-ar.exe` being named differently or called wrongly in the build process? The files that do exist are `ar.exe` and `x86_64-w64-mingw32-gcc-ar.exe` after installing all the `mingw-w64-x86_64-gcc` as instructed [here](https://docs.julialang.org/en/v1/devdocs/build/windows/#Compiling-with-MinGW/MSYS2)
","reactions":{"url":"https://api.github.com/repos/JuliaLang/julia/issues/52646/reactions","total_count":0,"+1":0,"-1":0,"laugh":0,"hooray":0,"confused":0,"heart":0,"rocket":0,"eyes":0},"timeline_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/JuliaLang/julia/issues/52646/timeline","performed_via_github_app":null,"state_reason":"completed"}}

Windows"}],"state":"closed","locked":false,"assignee":null,"assignees":[],"milestone":null,"comments":4,"created_at":"2023-12-27T23:05:30Z","updated_at":"2024-10-26T14:28:53Z","closed_at":"2024-10-26T14:28:51Z","author_association":"NONE","active_lock_reason":null,"body":"Hi,

I'm trying to compile **Julia v1.10** on **Windows** unsing **MinGW**. I had no issues in the past (v1.8.x/v1.9.x) but seems to not be working even after a completely fresh reinstal of MSYS and re-cloning the repo.

The error I get is this:
```
make[2]: x86_64-w64-mingw32-ar: No such file or directory
make[2]: *** [Makefile:81: libutf8proc.a] Error 127
make[1]: *** [/c/julia/deps/utf8proc.mk:13: scratch/utf8proc-1cb28a66ca79a0845e99433fd1056257456cef8b/build-compiled] Error 2
make[1]: *** Waiting for unfinished jobs....
...
...
make: *** [Makefile:75: julia-deps] Error 2
```

I believe it's related to `x86_64-w64-mingw32-ar.exe` being named differently or called wrongly in the build process? The files that do exist are `ar.exe` and `x86_64-w64-mingw32-gcc-ar.exe` after installing all the `mingw-w64-x86_64-gcc` as instructed [here](https://docs.julialang.org/en/v1/devdocs/build/windows/#Compiling-with-MinGW/MSYS2)

```
make[2]: x86_64-w64-mingw32-ar: No such file or directory
make[2]: *** [Makefile:81: libutf8proc.a] Error 127

I'm trying to compile **Julia v1.10** on **Windows** unsing **MinGW**. I had no issues in the past (v1.8.x/v1.9.x) but seems to not be working even after a completely fresh reinstal of MSYS and re-cloning the repo.

The error I get is this:
```
make[2]: x86_64-w64-mingw32-ar: No such file or directory
make[2]: *** [Makefile:81: libutf8proc.a] Error 127
make[1]: *** [/c/julia/deps/utf8proc.mk:13: scratch/utf8proc-1cb28a66ca79a0845e99433fd1056257456cef8b/build-compiled] Error 2
make[1]: *** Waiting for unfinished jobs....
...
...
make: *** [Makefile:75: julia-deps] Error 2
```

I believe it's related to `x86_64-w64-mingw32-ar.exe` being named differently or called wrongly in the build process? The files that do exist are `ar.exe` and `x86_64-w64-mingw32-gcc-ar.exe` after installing all the `mingw-w64-x86_64-gcc` as instructed [here](https://docs.julialang.org/en/v1/devdocs/build/windows/#Compiling-with-MinGW/MSYS2)
","reactions":{"url":"https://api.github.com/repos/JuliaLang/julia/issues/52646/reactions","total_count":0,"+1":0,"-1":0,"laugh":0,"hooray":0,"confused":0,"heart":0,"rocket":0,"eyes":0},"timeline_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/JuliaLang/julia/issues/52646/timeline","performed_via_github_app":null,"state_reason":null},"comment":{"url":"https://api.github.com/repos/JuliaLang/julia/issues/comments/1870683777","html_url":"https://github.com/JuliaLang/julia/issues/52646#issuecomment-1870683777","issue_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/JuliaLang/julia/issues/52646","id":1870683777,"node_id":"IC_kwDOABkWpM5vgF6B","user":{"login":"Titas22","id":66130422,"node_id":"MDQ6VXNlcjY2MTMwNDIy","avatar_url":"https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/66130422?v=4","gravatar_id":"","url":"https://api.github.com/users/Titas22","html_url":"https://github.com/Titas22","followers_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Titas22/followers","following_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Titas22/following{/other_user}","gists_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Titas22/gists{/gist_id}","starred_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Titas22/starred{/owner}{/repo}","subscriptions_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Titas22/subscriptions","organizations_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Titas22/orgs","repos_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Titas22/repos","events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Titas22/events{/privacy}","received_events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Titas22/received_events","type":"User","site_admin":false},"created_at":"2023-12-27T23:11:01Z","updated_at":"2023-12-27T23:11:01Z","author_association":"NONE","body":"Creating a copy of the already existing `ar.exe` and naming it `x86_64-w64-mingw32-ar.exe` allowed the process to go further until another missing file:

```
/bin/sh: line 5: x86_64-w64-mingw32-windres: command not found
make[1]: *** [Makefile:77: julia_res.o] Error 127
make[1]: *** Waiting for unfinished jobs....
    PERL base/errno_h.jl
    PERL base/features_h.jl
    PERL base/file_constants.jl
    CC usr/bin/libccalltest.dll
make: *** [Makefile:94: julia-cli-release] Error 2
make: *** Waiting for unfinished jobs....
```

Again, `windres.exe` exists instead of `x86_64-w64-mingw32-windres.exe`

{"action":"created","issue":{"url":"https://api.github.com/repos/JuliaLang/julia/issues/52646","repository_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/JuliaLang/julia","labels_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/JuliaLang/julia/issues/52646/labels{/name}","comments_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/JuliaLang/julia/issues/52646/comments","events_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/JuliaLang/julia/issues/52646/events","html_url":"https://github.com/JuliaLang/julia/issues/52646","id":2057833926,"node_id":"I_kwDOABkWpM56qA3G","number":52646,"title":"make[2]: x86_64-w64-mingw32-ar: No such file or directory","user":{"login":"Titas22","id":66130422,"node_id":"MDQ6VXNlcjY2MTMwNDIy","avatar_url":"https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/66130422?v=4","gravatar_id":"","url":"https://api.github.com/users/Titas22","html_url":"https://github.com/Titas22","followers_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Titas22/followers","following_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Titas22/following{/other_user}","gists_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Titas22/gists{/gist_id}","starred_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Titas22/starred{/owner}{/repo}","subscriptions_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Titas22/subscriptions","organizations_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Titas22/orgs","repos_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Titas22/repos","events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Titas22/events{/privacy}","received_events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Titas22/received_events","type":"User","site_admin":false},"labels":[],"state":"open","locked":false,"assignee":null,"assignees":[],"milestone":null,"comments":2,"created_at":"2023-12-27T23:05:30Z","updated_at":"2023-12-27T23:23:45Z","closed_at":null,"author_association":"NONE","active_lock_reason":null,"body":"Hi,

I'm trying to compile **Julia v1.10** on **Windows** unsing **MinGW**. I had no issues in the past (v1.8.x/v1.9.x) but seems to not be working even after a completely fresh reinstal of MSYS and re-cloning the repo.

The error I get is this:
```
make[2]: x86_64-w64-mingw32-ar: No such file or directory
make[2]: *** [Makefile:81: libutf8proc.a] Error 127
make[1]: *** [/c/julia/deps/utf8proc.mk:13: scratch/utf8proc-1cb28a66ca79a0845e99433fd1056257456cef8b/build-compiled] Error 2
make[1]: *** Waiting for unfinished jobs....

make: *** [Makefile:75: julia-deps] Error 2

The files that do exist are `ar.exe` and `x86_64-w64-mingw32-gcc-ar.exe` after installing all the `mingw-w64-x86_64-gcc` as instructed [here](https://docs.julialang.org/en/v1/devdocs/build/windows/#Compiling-with-MinGW/MSYS2)

After creating a copy of that the build seemed to be going for a while but ended up with the following error which I cannot understand:
```
    LINK usr/bin/libjulia-internal.dll
